hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "cargo[[:space:]]+(run|check|build|test)\b" && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE -- "--release\b" && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE -- "--features([= ])[^|;&]*\bdev\b"; then printf "%s" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Use --features dev for cargo run/check/build/test in this project (enables Bevy dynamic_linking for fast incremental builds). For release builds, include --release."}}'; fi
